name: python3-zope.deprecation
title: python3-zope.deprecation
description:
Zope Deprecation Infrastructure
This package provides a simple function called 'deprecated(names, reason)' to
mark deprecated modules, classes, functions, methods and properties.
.
This is the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-zope.deprecation because Zope Deprecation Infrastructure.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-zope.deprecation as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-zope.deprecation with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-zope.deprecation --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
